heading: Dissemination
label: 11252 Dissemination
text: The Director of the National Institute of Mental Health shall disseminate the results of research conducted under this part to appropriate professional entities and to the public.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was classified to prior to repeal by .section 932 of Pub. L. 99–660section 11232 of this titlesection 142(c)(1)(A) of Pub. L. 100–607
